---
title: "The Mariner’s Chronicle: Being a Collection of the Most Interesting Narratives of Shipwrecks, Fires, Famines, and Other Calamities Incident to a Life of Maritime Enterprise"
---

## The Mariner’s Chronicle: Being a Collection of the Most Interesting Narratives of Shipwrecks, Fires, Famines, and Other Calamities Incident to a Life of Maritime Enterprise

**Author:** Archibald Duncan
**Date:** 1804-1805
**Imprint:** London: Cundee

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
